title: pelargonium × kingii
intro: Pelargonium × kingii, also known as King's Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium linifolium. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × kingii include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce stress, anxiety, and menstrual cramps, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Pelargonium × kingii can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
